column1: # Barnard catalog crossref: intentionally empty in v0.15.0.
# Dark nebulae and any emission regions at the same line of sight are physically
# distinct objects. B33 (Horsehead) and IC 434 (backing emission) should remain
# separate DSOs; merging would conflate two different physical phenomena.
# File is tracked by the loader registry so the architecture stays symmetric
# with sharpless_crossref.csv. Future editorial decisions may add rows.
